svg.text: High-frequency aggregate trades, L5 depth features, order-flow imbalance, OHLC candles, and latency diagnostics
Open, high, low, close candles built from event-level aggTrade prices.
Best bid, best ask, and midprice reconstructed from the local L5 book.
Stacked buy and sell volume per time bucket.
Quoted spread from the treated book. Spikes usually mean a book update widened the top of book.
Book imbalance and trade imbalance on the configured rolling window.
Total bid and ask liquidity across the top five book levels.
Limit additions versus cancels/trades inferred from per-level quantity deltas.
Mock mode uses deterministic jitter with rare spikes, so it should look irregular but bounded.
Rows written, sample columns, and latency summary for the latest run.
price, quantity, trade side, receive latency
raw bid/ask deltas and update ids
latency summary: mock.aggTrade avg 6.548 ms, max 12.822 ms | mock.depth avg 6.554 ms, max 12.435 ms
